description: Get a firewall zone on a site.

fields.name: metadata
fields.type: object (User or system defined entity metadata)
fields.description: System-defined configurable zones support configuring only attached networks

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/zones/{firewallZoneId}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get Firewall Zone
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/zones/{firewallZoneId}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/zones/{firewallZoneId}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get Firewall Zone
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/zones/{firewallZoneId}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
